slides.title: Your body has a *thermostat*. This test reads it.
slides.sub: A TSH test checks your thyroid, the gland that sets your metabolic pace. One number can explain a lot.

slides.title: The thyroid sets your pace
slides.body: Your thyroid is the *thermostat* for metabolism. It quietly shapes your energy, weight and how clearly you think each day.

slides.title: TSH is the dial reading
slides.body: TSH is the brain's message to the thyroid. An out-of-range result *can flag* a gland working too hard or too little.

slides.title: The symptoms feel vague
slides.body: Stubborn fatigue, slow weight changes and brain fog *are linked to* thyroid imbalance, yet they hide in plain sight for years.

slides.title: Effort alone won't fix it
slides.body: When the dial is off, more sleep and cleaner food *only go so far*. A simple blood test points you to the real cause.

slides.title: Test, then track
slides.body: Ask your doctor about a TSH check. Then watch the *energy and weight patterns* a result alone can never show you.

slides.title: See the patterns a test can't.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food, movement and steps in one daily Health Score, so changes in energy and weight are easy to spot and share.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Stubborn fatigue and brain fog aren't always about willpower. Sometimes it's your thyroid, the thermostat that sets your metabolic rate. 🌿

A simple TSH test can reveal what lifestyle alone cannot fix, and tracking your energy and weight makes the picture clearer. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Thyroid Test That Explains Your Fatigue
